ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key in the daily note's frontmatter where new-note links are appended.
ast.target: 每日笔记前置信息中用于追加新笔记链接的键。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated file extensions to track. Leave the dot off.
ast.target: 要跟踪的逗号分隔的文件扩展名。请省略点号。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Comma-separated folder paths whose new files should be ignored.
ast.target: 应忽略其新文件的逗号分隔的文件夹路径。

ast.target: 如果缺失则创建每日笔记
